# Benjamin Ghajiga

Benjamin Ghajiga is a versatile and accomplished Full-Stack Web Developer, Web3 Developer, and Video Editor based in Abuja, Nigeria, with 4+ years of experience delivering impactful digital solutions. He blends technical depth — spanning React, Node.js, Algorand, Cardano, and Solidity — with creative production skills in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve. A hackathon winner (2025 Model and I Hackathon) and funded project contributor (Secuda on Cardano), Benjamin has a strong track record of taking products from concept to launch for startups, NGOs, and Web3 ecosystems. His brand communicates innovation, versatility, and a bold creative-technical identity.

Source: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app

---

# Benjamin Ghajiga



### Full-Stack Web Developer | Web3 Developer | Video Editor

# Services for teams building digital products.


Benjamin supports startups, NGOs, Web3 projects, and businesses with a blend of full-stack engineering, blockchain development, and creative production.





Web apps



Web3 products



Video production














## Services & Expertise



A streamlined onboarding portal for clients seeking web apps, blockchain products, or video production. Every service is designed as a clear next step toward collaboration.













### Full-Stack Development


Responsive websites, dashboards, React frontends, Node.js backends, REST APIs, SEO-aware builds, and Framer/no-code launches. I build performant, scalable digital products from concept to deployment.


- Custom React & Node.js Applications

- REST API Design & Integration

- SEO-Optimized Web Architectures

- Framer & No-Code Rapid Launches











### Web3 & Blockchain


dApp interfaces, smart contract integration, Algorand, Cardano, Solidity basics, and wallet-friendly user flows. I bridge Web2 usability with decentralized infrastructure for startups and ecosystems.


- Decentralized Application (dApp) Frontends

- Smart Contract Integration & Testing

- Algorand, Cardano & Solidity Workflows

- Wallet-Connected User Experiences











### Video Editing & Production


Promotional videos, explainer edits, motion graphics, color grading, sound design, and post-production workflows. I craft compelling visual narratives with Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve.


- Promotional & Explainer Video Editing

- Motion Graphics & Visual Effects

- Professional Color Grading

- Sound Design & Post-Production














## The Development Process


From concept to launch, a structured workflow that ensures clarity, quality, and results at every stage.












1





### Clarify the Goal


We start by defining the product vision, target audience, and measurable success criteria. This foundational phase aligns stakeholders and sets a clear roadmap for the entire project.









2





### Map the Build


I plan the technical architecture, content strategy, and user interface design. Deliverables are scoped precisely — whether it's a web app, dApp, dashboard, or video production timeline.









3





### Produce & Develop


This is where the build happens — coding the frontend and backend, integrating smart contracts, or editing and producing video assets. Regular check-ins keep everything aligned with the initial vision.









4





### Launch & Refine


After rigorous testing, we deploy to production. I monitor performance, gather feedback, and iterate quickly. The final handoff includes documentation and support to ensure long-term success.













## Why teams choose a creative technical partner.







One person can connect design, engineering, Web3, and video.







Complex blockchain interactions become easier for non-technical users.







Product demos and promotional content can be created alongside the build.







NGO and startup workflows are handled with practical delivery focus.










### Project Readiness Assessment



- Full-stack architecture review Ready

- Smart contract integration Ready

- UI/UX design system Ready

- Video production assets Ready

- SEO & performance baseline Ready











Project intake open

Share your project goal, timeline, and the kind of support you need — whether it's a full-stack web application, a Web3 dApp, or professional video production with motion graphics in Adobe After Effects.

# Selected work and achievements


A focused look at Benjamin's product builds, Web3 submissions, creative leadership, and shipped digital experiences — spanning full-stack web user interface design, motion graphics in adobe after effects, and blockchain-powered applications.






Winner — Model and I Hackathon 2025





Funded — Secuda on Cardano 2024





Freelance delivery — startups, NGOs, and businesses













## Featured Case Studies


A selection of projects spanning full-stack web development, Web3 engineering, and creative video production — built for startups, NGOs, and blockchain ecosystems.









Web3
Cardano


### Secuda


Role: Lead Developer & Designer




#### Challenge


Building a trust-focused, secure on-chain data storage platform on Cardano that balances technical complexity with an intuitive user interface for non-technical stakeholders.




#### Solution


Designed and developed the full frontend architecture, integrated Web3 authentication and transaction flows, and crafted a clean, trust-oriented interface. Produced video walkthroughs to communicate the platform's value proposition to investors and users.




#### Outcome


Received funding recognition and established a strong technical foundation for the project, enabling further development and community growth.














Web3
Crowdfunding


### Faundlab


Role: Lead Developer & Designer




#### Challenge


Creating a Web3 crowdfunding platform that makes scientific research funding transparent, accessible, and engaging for a global community of donors and researchers.




#### Solution


Designed an intuitive donation and discovery flow that simplifies complex Web3 interactions. Implemented smart contract integrations for transparent fund management and produced compelling demo videos to showcase the platform's impact.




#### Outcome


Delivered a fully functional MVP that attracted early-stage interest from research communities and demonstrated the viability of decentralized science funding.














Hackathon Winner
2025


### Model and I Hackathon


Role: Core Developer & Creative Lead




#### Challenge


Delivering a complete, functional product within a high-pressure hackathon environment, combining frontend development, Web3 integration, and compelling pitch materials.




#### Solution


Led the frontend development and Web3 integration efforts, ensuring a seamless user experience. Created high-impact promotional video content that effectively communicated the project's vision and technical capabilities to the judges.




#### Outcome


Won the 2025 Model and I Hackathon, demonstrating the ability to deliver polished, innovative digital products under tight deadlines.


















## Work sample directions



A curated look at the interfaces, flows, and creative boards that define my process across web, Web3, and video production.









React



### React Dashboard Interface


A modular admin panel built with React featuring real-time data widgets, clean sidebar navigation, and success-state indicators.


Dashboard
UI Design








NGO



### NGO Website Build


A full-stack website for a non-profit, emphasizing clear calls-to-action, program transparency, and a warm, trustworthy visual identity.


Full-Stack
Web Design








Web3



### Cardano dApp Flow


A secure wallet-connect flow and transaction dashboard designed for a Cardano-based decentralized application with blockchain data transparency.


Blockchain
Cardano








Funding



### Crowdfunding Donation Screen


A conversion-optimized donation interface with tiered rewards, a dynamic progress tracker, and a warm, action-oriented checkout experience.


UX Flow
Payment








Video



### Explainer Video Timeline


A multi-track editing timeline for a tech explainer video, showcasing precise cuts, motion graphics integration, and color grading layers.


Premiere Pro
Editing








Motion



### Motion Graphics Storyboard


A keyframe-driven animation storyboard built in After Effects, blending geometric motion with warm creative accents for brand storytelling.


After Effects
Animation

Professional Bio


# About Benjamin Ghajiga



Benjamin is a versatile Full-Stack Web Developer, Web3 Developer, and Video Editor based in Abuja, Nigeria. With 4+ years of experience, he helps teams turn ideas into shipped web products, blockchain interfaces, and compelling video content.


He combines React, Node.js, Algorand, Cardano, and Solidity basics with creative tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve. A hackathon winner and funded project contributor, Benjamin brings both technical depth and creative vision to every engagement — from web user interface design to motion graphics in adobe after effects.



4+
Years Experience


50+
Projects Delivered


15+
Happy Clients





Get In Touch



View Portfolio











## Skills & Expertise


A versatile toolkit spanning full-stack development, Web3 engineering, and creative video production.









### Full-Stack Development



- HTML

- CSS

- JavaScript

- React

- Node.js

- REST APIs

- No-Code (Framer)









### Web3 & Blockchain



- dApp Development

- Smart Contract Integration

- Algorand

- Cardano

- Solidity Basics









### Video Editing & Production



- Adobe Premiere Pro

- DaVinci Resolve

- After Effects

- Color Grading

- Motion Graphics

- Sound Design

- Content Creation









### Design & Collaboration



- Figma

- Framer

- Adobe Illustrator

- Photoshop

- Canva

- SEO

- Git

- Agile Collaboration

- Cross-functional Teamwork












## Professional Experience


Over 4 years of building impactful digital products, Web3 applications, and compelling video content across diverse industries.













2023 – Present

### Freelance Full-Stack & Web3 Developer



Designed and developed full-stack websites, web applications, and interactive dashboards for startups and NGOs. Built decentralized application (dApp) interfaces and integrated Web3 technologies including smart contracts and blockchain data. Produced promotional and explainer videos, blending technical precision with creative storytelling to elevate brand presence.


React
Node.js
Algorand
Cardano
Solidity
Adobe Premiere Pro









2025 – Present

### Video Editor Volunteer

Sandlip Oasis


Produced engaging video content for community projects and events, supporting branding and visual communication efforts. Leveraged advanced motion graphics in Adobe After Effects and DaVinci Resolve to create professional-grade promotional materials that amplify community impact and outreach.


Adobe After Effects
DaVinci Resolve
Motion Graphics
Sound Design









Dec 2023 – May 2024

### Designer Intern

Sandlip Digital Consulting


Assisted in digital branding initiatives, web user interface design, and front-end development. Created marketing visuals and contributed to client website user interface design projects using Figma and Adobe Illustrator, ensuring cohesive brand identities and responsive, user-friendly interfaces across multiple platforms.


Figma
Adobe Illustrator
Web UI Design
Branding

















## Certifications



- ### Google UX Design Certificate Google

- ### Brand Design Course Davio White

- ### Video Editing & Post-Production Self-Directed & Online Expertise in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve for professional motion graphics and color grading.











## Education



- ### BSc Software Engineering Federal University Wukari Sept 2025 — Present





Actively Enrolled

## Ideal Project Types


Clear, focused, and built for impact. Here's who I work with best.






For Startups


### MVPs, Dashboards & Product Demos


From concept to launch-ready MVPs, interactive dashboards, and high-conversion marketing sites. I help startups ship fast without sacrificing quality.


- Rapid MVP development

- Interactive dashboards

- Marketing websites

- Product demo videos







For NGOs


### Websites, Campaigns & Awareness Videos


Purpose-driven digital experiences for non-profits. I build accessible websites, campaign pages, content management systems, and compelling video content that amplifies your mission.


- Accessible websites

- Campaign landing pages

- Content management systems

- Awareness & impact videos







For Web3 Teams


### dApp Interfaces, Wallet Flows & Smart Contract Support


Decentralized applications with seamless user experiences. I design wallet integrations, smart contract interfaces, and demo content for Algorand, Cardano, and EVM-based ecosystems.


- dApp user interfaces

- Wallet connection flows

- Smart contract integration

- Web3 demo content










## What happens after you reach out





1



### Review & Discovery


Benjamin reviews your goal and context to understand the full scope of your project.









2



### Scope & Agreement


You agree on scope, timeline, and deliverables to ensure complete alignment.









3



### Build & Production


The build or production process begins with clear checkpoints and regular updates.









4



### Final Delivery


Final delivery includes launch support or handoff guidance for a smooth transition.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy





























- Home
- Services
- Work
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/10/2026



Benjamin Ghajiga ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Benjamin Ghajiga

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement





























- Home
- Services
- Work
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 10, 2026



Benjamin Ghajiga is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Benjamin Ghajiga

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions





























- Home
- Services
- Work
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 10, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Benjamin Ghajiga

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Web Development & Creative Technology provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Benjamin Ghajiga provides Web Development & Creative Technology through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Benjamin Ghajiga. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Benjamin Ghajiga

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
